name: Exposure of Version-Control Repository to an Unauthorized Control Sphere
description: The product stores a CVS, git, or other version control repository in a location accessible to unauthorized actors, potentially revealing usernames, file paths, IP addresses, and source code diffs.
detection_pattern: STORAGE node contains .git/.svn/.cvs directory under web-accessible STRUCTURAL path, allowing EXTERNAL actors to access repository via INGRESS HTTP requests without AUTH restriction
